single_next_action.name: weighted-scale-segment-000
single_next_action.scope: Exactly the 256 cases in frozen segment weighted-scale-000.
single_next_action.method: Cloud sequential continuous set-cover LP at the unchanged one-second cap; emit deterministic compact certificates and receipts only; independently reconstruct and check every certificate before it counts.
single_next_action.stop: Stop after exactly 256 cases or immediately on membership/hash/checker/resource failure. Failed certificate attempts remain open. Do not run segment 001 in the same tranche.
single_next_action.continue_gate: At least 240 independently checked certificates, 100% checker reliability, median runtime below 0.5 seconds, and measured storage consistent with the 12.11 MB full projection.

claim_limit: The compact package changes representation only. The scale manifest closes nothing until future per-case arithmetic certificates are independently checked; ancestors still require complete aggregation.
